## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration and knowledge sharing between Closers AI and fwd.digital in AI-driven marketing and sales automation.](https://fathom.video/share/KCYboG7yhyqVauH5dys97GKMJ295KT2i?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Matias (Closers AI) is developing voice AI for sales calls, seeking to expand into AI-driven SEO](https://fathom.video/share/KCYboG7yhyqVauH5dys97GKMJ295KT2i?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Marcel (fwd.digital) offers comprehensive AI-powered content strategy and SEO services, with rapid growth to $2M ARR in 5 months](https://fathom.video/share/KCYboG7yhyqVauH5dys97GKMJ295KT2i?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [fwd.digital provides workshops and community support for DIY AI SEO, suitable for early-stage startups with limited budgets](https://fathom.video/share/KCYboG7yhyqVauH5dys97GKMJ295KT2i?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Recommended tech stack for startups: Koala, HubSpot/Salesforce (for demos), Webflow for hosting initially](https://fathom.video/share/KCYboG7yhyqVauH5dys97GKMJ295KT2i?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)

## Topics

### Closers AI Background

  - [Matias comes from marketing background (ads, outreach, lead gen)](https://fathom.video/share/KCYboG7yhyqVauH5dys97GKMJ295KT2i?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Pivoted to voice AI for automating sales calls](https://fathom.video/share/KCYboG7yhyqVauH5dys97GKMJ295KT2i?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Early-stage startup working with first batch of clients](https://fathom.video/share/KCYboG7yhyqVauH5dys97GKMJ295KT2i?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Limited resources (\~$25k from AI program support)](https://fathom.video/share/KCYboG7yhyqVauH5dys97GKMJ295KT2i?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)

### fwd.digital Services Overview

  - [Comprehensive AI-powered content strategy and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/KCYboG7yhyqVauH5dys97GKMJ295KT2i?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [Analyze 33,000+ keywords, process 20M+ tokens for content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/KCYboG7yhyqVauH5dys97GKMJ295KT2i?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Generate 3100+ assignments with custom AI-driven relevance scoring](https://fathom.video/share/KCYboG7yhyqVauH5dys97GKMJ295KT2i?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [Full-service content creation pipeline: keyword research, title generation, outlining, article writing, post-processing](https://fathom.video/share/KCYboG7yhyqVauH5dys97GKMJ295KT2i?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Customization for client-specific guidelines (e.g., Reddit, attention.com)](https://fathom.video/share/KCYboG7yhyqVauH5dys97GKMJ295KT2i?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Editorial team and growth team as a service](https://fathom.video/share/KCYboG7yhyqVauH5dys97GKMJ295KT2i?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [Focus on conversion rate optimization after 3-4 months](https://fathom.video/share/KCYboG7yhyqVauH5dys97GKMJ295KT2i?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)

### AI SEO Workshop and Community

  - [5-hour workshops (3 cohorts completed, 133 participants)](https://fathom.video/share/KCYboG7yhyqVauH5dys97GKMJ295KT2i?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
  - [Upcoming 2x3-hour sessions on AI workflows beyond content/SEO](https://fathom.video/share/KCYboG7yhyqVauH5dys97GKMJ295KT2i?tab=summary&timestamp=1018.0)
  - [Slack community for ongoing support and knowledge sharing](https://fathom.video/share/KCYboG7yhyqVauH5dys97GKMJ295KT2i?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
  - [Success story: Bob from good call.io 40x'd traffic in 120 days post-workshop](https://fathom.video/share/KCYboG7yhyqVauH5dys97GKMJ295KT2i?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)

### Tech Stack Recommendations

  - [Koala: Highly recommended for early-stage startups](https://fathom.video/share/KCYboG7yhyqVauH5dys97GKMJ295KT2i?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
  - [CRM: ITO (flexible) or HubSpot/Salesforce (industry standard, good for demos)](https://fathom.video/share/KCYboG7yhyqVauH5dys97GKMJ295KT2i?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Website: Webflow for hosting and CMS initially](https://fathom.video/share/KCYboG7yhyqVauH5dys97GKMJ295KT2i?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
  - [Consider headless CMS only at a much larger scale](https://fathom.video/share/KCYboG7yhyqVauH5dys97GKMJ295KT2i?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)

## Next Steps

  - Matias to sign up for upcoming fwd.digital workshop
  - Marcel to provide recordings of previous workshop cohorts
  - Marcel to add Matias to the AI SEO Slack community
  - Explore potential future collaboration as Closers AI grows
  - Matias to consider fwd.digital's referral program for future connections
